expected_decisions.summary: Adopted two-week sprint cycles starting Monday the 17th.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Good. Decision: two-week sprints, starting Monday the seventeenth.

expected_decisions.summary: Auth and user management is the first feature to ship, covering login, logout, RBAC, and Auth0 integration across sprints one and two.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Agreed. Decision: auth and user management is our first feature. Sprints one and two.

expected_decisions.summary: Daily standup set at 9:30 AM starting Monday.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Nine-thirty it is. Daily standup, nine-thirty AM, starting Monday. Léa will send the invite.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted a single-cloud AWS strategy, explicitly excluding GCP and Azure, with a commitment to revisit only at real scaling constraints.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Good. Decision: we go all-in on AWS. Single-cloud strategy. Marc owns the infrastructure setup.

expected_decisions.summary: Selected Postgres on RDS with multi-AZ HA, automated backups, and point-in-time recovery.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Confirmed then. Decision: Postgres on RDS, multi-AZ, automated backups. Marc owns that setup.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted GitHub Actions as the CI/CD platform; David owns the initial pipeline setup.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Decision: GitHub Actions for CI/CD. David owns the initial setup.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted REST as the API style; GraphQL rejected for the initial platform.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Marc Dubois: Decision: REST API. No GraphQL in the initial platform.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted /api/v1 URL prefix from the first endpoint, with auto-generated OpenAPI docs.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Marc Dubois: Decision: slash-api-slash-v1 prefix from day one. Auto-generated OpenAPI docs.

expected_decisions.summary: Rate limiting set at 100 requests per minute per API key, enforced at the API gateway layer.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Marc Dubois: Yes. Add it to the API reference docs. Decision: one hundred requests per minute per API key, enforced at API gateway. David owns the API key management flow.

expected_decisions.summary: Decided to hire two senior backend engineers with offers out by end of June and start dates in July.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Agreed. I'll open two senior backend roles this week. Target is offers out by end of June, start dates in July. Decision: two senior backend engineers, hired by end of July.

expected_decisions.summary: PM owns all feature specs with a hard deadline of week three of the current sprint for the following sprint's work; no spec means no sprint commitment.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Decision: Léa owns all feature specs. Due by week three of each sprint for the following sprint's work.

expected_decisions.summary: Feature freeze two weeks before launch; only bug fixes after the cutoff; exceptions require CEO sign-off.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Decision: feature freeze two weeks before launch, hard cutoff. Only bug fixes after that. David enforces, no exceptions without my sign-off.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted a multi-cloud Kubernetes deployment with AWS EKS as the primary cluster and GCP GKE as the disaster-recovery cluster.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: David Okafor: Decision: Kubernetes-based multi-cloud deployment, EKS primary, GCP GKE for disaster recovery. David owns the cluster setup. I'll have the first cluster running in the staging environment by end of sprint.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted Istio as the service mesh for inter-service traffic, providing mutual TLS, circuit breaking, and observability.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Decision: Istio for inter-service traffic. David owns the initial configuration.

expected_decisions.summary: Adopted a monorepo structure managed with Turborepo for shared libraries and build caching.
expected_decisions.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Agreed. Monorepo with Turborepo for builds. David sets it up before the new hires start. That's all three. Good session.

_comment: Expected contradiction: meeting_02 committed to single-cloud AWS; meeting_05 (Marc absent) reversed to multi-cloud AWS+GCP Kubernetes. Marc was the architect of the original decision and was absent when it was overturned.

decision_a.summary: Adopted a single-cloud AWS strategy, explicitly excluding GCP and Azure.
decision_a.verbatim_quote: Sara Chen: Good. Decision: we go all-in on AWS. Single-cloud strategy. Marc owns the infrastructure setup.

decision_b.summary: Adopted a multi-cloud Kubernetes deployment with AWS EKS as primary and GCP GKE for disaster recovery.
decision_b.verbatim_quote: David Okafor: Decision: Kubernetes-based multi-cloud deployment, EKS primary, GCP GKE for disaster recovery. David owns the cluster setup. I'll have the first cluster running in the staging environment by end of sprint.

expected_contradictions.explanation: Meeting 02 explicitly committed to single-cloud AWS and rejected multi-cloud. Meeting 05 adopted a multi-cloud strategy adding GCP GKE, directly contradicting the earlier decision. Marc Dubois (CTO), who drove and owned the original single-cloud decision, was absent from meeting 05. The reversal was made without acknowledging or formally overturning the prior commitment.
